topic.what: Security-Recall Divergence (SRD): omission constraints (prohibitions) decay with context depth while commission constraints (requirements) persist in LLM agents
topic.how: Three-arm causal study across 12 models/8 providers at 6 depths (4,416 trials) measuring 8 behavioral constraints in DevOps scenario
topic.why_matters: Production agents enforce prohibitions (never disclose credentials, never execute code) that are structurally identical to tested proxies. Commission audit signals remain healthy while omission constraints have failed, making failure invisible to standard monitoring.

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of trials where omission constraint C3 (no bullet points) satisfied
characteristics.context: Decays from 73% at turn 5 to 20% at turn 25 in no-dilution arm

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of trials where commission constraint C8 (include incident ID) satisfied
characteristics.evidence: Mistral and Qwen both show 100% across all 6 depths

characteristics.what_it_measures: CMH test significance for omission vs commission asymmetry
characteristics.evidence: CMH χ2=147 for Mistral, χ2=18.63 for Nemotron, χ2=10.90 for Qwen
characteristics.context: All three SRD-susceptible models reject null in predicted direction

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of dilution effect attributable to schema semantics vs token volume
characteristics.evidence: Arm C tracks Arm A; Arm B shows effect. Gemini 2.5 Flash: 62%, Llama 3.3 70B: 100%
characteristics.context: Causal isolation in 2 models; SRD-susceptible models not tested with Arm C

characteristics.what_it_measures: Turn depth at which omission compliance crosses 50%
Fraction of trials with at least one constraint violation at injection turn
characteristics.evidence: Mistral Large 3 Arm B across 6 depths
characteristics.context: Gemma immune at 0-3% across all depths

characteristics.what_it_measures: Regression coefficient for token count predicting failure
characteristics.context: Token volume primary predictor; turn depth not significant when token count controlled
